user.title: Doubao Speech
user.description: Connect to Volcengine Doubao TTS large-model 2.0. Get an API Key from the Volcengine speech console (语音技术 → API Key).

error.invalid_auth: Authentication failed. Check the API Key and Resource ID.
error.cannot_connect: Cannot reach the Doubao TTS service. Check network, voice and quota.

abort.already_configured: This API Key is already configured.
